CodeMirrorViewEventIds

com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorViewEventIds
No inheritance
Subclasses
Class has no subclasses.
Dependencies
Class has no dependencies.
Import code
var CodeMirrorViewEventIds = dbm.importClass("com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorViewEventIds");
Full code
dbm.registerClass("com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorViewEventIds", null, function(objectFunctions, staticFunctions, ClassReference) { //console.log("com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorViewEventIds"); var CodeMirrorViewEventIds = dbm.importClass("com.developedbyme.thirdparty.codemirror.constants.CodeMirrorViewEventIds"); staticFunctions.CHANGE = "change"; staticFunctions.CHANGES = "changes"; staticFunctions.BEFORE_CHANGE = "beforeChange"; staticFunctions.CURSOR_ACTIVITY = "cursorActivity"; staticFunctions.KEY_HANDLED = "keyHandled"; staticFunctions.INPUT_READ = "inputRead"; staticFunctions.BEFORE_SELECTION_CHANGE = "beforeSelectionChange"; staticFunctions.VIEWPORT_CHANGE = "viewportChange"; staticFunctions.SWAP_DOC = "swapDoc"; staticFunctions.GUTTER_CLICK = "gutterClick"; staticFunctions.GUTTER_CONTEXT_MENU = "gutterContextMenu"; staticFunctions.FOCUS = "focus"; staticFunctions.BLUR = "blur"; staticFunctions.SCROLL = "scroll"; staticFunctions.UPDATE = "update"; staticFunctions.RENDER_LINE = "renderLine"; staticFunctions.MOUSE_DOWN = "mousedown"; staticFunctions.DOUBLE_CLICK = "dblclick"; staticFunctions.CONTEXT_MENU = "contextmenu"; staticFunctions.KEY_DOWN = "keydown"; staticFunctions.KEY_PRESS = "keypress"; staticFunctions.KEY_UP = "keyup"; staticFunctions.DRAG_START = "dragstart"; staticFunctions.DRAG_ENTER = "dragenter"; staticFunctions.DRAG_OVER = "dragover"; staticFunctions.DROP = "drop"; })
